obligations.area: direct-verification objective map and no-proxy guard
obligations.required_evidence: machine-readable W040 obligation map, promotion-target gate map, and no-proxy guard before later evidence beads start
obligations.promotion_consequence: release-grade, C5, pack-grade, Stage 2, service, diversity, OxFml breadth, callable metadata, and full-formalization claims remain blocked unless later W040 evidence satisfies their target guards

obligations.required_evidence: direct optimized/core differential for dynamic negative dependency, dependency release, and dependency reclassification profiles, or exact residual blocker
obligations.promotion_consequence: full optimized/core verification remains blocked

obligations.area: snapshot fence and capability fence counterparts
obligations.required_evidence: coordinator and optimized/core evidence for stale-candidate snapshot rejection and capability-view fence mismatch behavior under promoted profiles
obligations.promotion_consequence: snapshot/capability conformance and Stage 2 readiness remain blocked

obligations.required_evidence: callable metadata projection fixture or implementation evidence, or proof of callable carrier sufficiency across consumed OxFml LET/LAMBDA rows without general OxFunc kernel promotion
obligations.promotion_consequence: callable metadata projection and broad callable conformance remain blocked

obligations.required_evidence: zero declared-gap match promotion for optimized/core, replay, pack, service, diversity, and OxFml seam rows
obligations.promotion_consequence: pack/C5 and release-grade decisions remain no-promotion if any target depends on a declared gap counted as a match

obligations.area: Rust totality and panic-free core domain
obligations.required_evidence: panic-free and totality evidence for promoted Rust paths, or exact totality blockers with uncovered paths named
obligations.promotion_consequence: Rust-engine totality remains blocked

obligations.required_evidence: refinement relation from TraceCalc-covered reference behavior to optimized/core behavior, with totality boundaries named for non-covered Rust paths
obligations.promotion_consequence: full formalization and optimized/core verification remain blocked

obligations.required_evidence: checked Lean rows that separate discharged proof, explicit assumption, external seam, and unproved totality boundary, with axiom/sorry/admit audit
obligations.promotion_consequence: full Lean verification remains blocked

obligations.area: TLA model coverage and fairness assumptions
obligations.required_evidence: checked TLA/TLC rows with model bounds, unboundedness limits, fairness/scheduler assumptions, and promotion predicates stated
obligations.promotion_consequence: full TLA verification and Stage 2 policy remain blocked

obligations.required_evidence: production-relevant partition analyzer soundness statement or proof for promoted profiles, including dynamic references, soft dependencies, publication fences, and capability fences
obligations.promotion_consequence: Stage 2 production policy remains blocked

obligations.area: Stage 2 observable invariance and replay equivalence
obligations.required_evidence: baseline-versus-partition replay equivalence for published values, rejects, dependencies, topology consequences, overlays, and replay validation across promoted profiles
obligations.promotion_consequence: Stage 2 policy and pack-grade replay remain blocked

obligations.required_evidence: runnable operated runner, scheduler, run retention, regression thresholds, and service-readable run history artifacts
obligations.promotion_consequence: operated continuous assurance service remains blocked

obligations.area: retained history and witness service lifecycle
obligations.required_evidence: retained history or witness service with lifecycle, retention, query, and replay-correlation guarantees
obligations.promotion_consequence: retained history service and pack-grade replay governance remain blocked

obligations.required_evidence: enforcing alert dispatcher wired to quarantine policy, threshold rules, retained evidence, and replay-correlation artifacts
obligations.promotion_consequence: alert/quarantine service remains blocked

obligations.required_evidence: operated TraceCalc, optimized/core, and OxFml differential service with retained mismatch, quarantine, and replay artifacts
obligations.promotion_consequence: cross-engine service, independent diversity, Stage 2, pack-grade replay, and C5 remain blocked

obligations.required_evidence: independently implemented evaluator row set with authority distinct from TraceCalc, optimized/core, and shared fixture projections
obligations.promotion_consequence: fully independent evaluator diversity remains blocked

obligations.required_evidence: differential rows that classify agreement, mismatch, authority, quarantine, and spec-evolution consequences without shared-projection promotion
obligations.promotion_consequence: independent diversity and cross-engine differential promotion remain blocked

obligations.required_evidence: current seam-watch row proving OxCalc emits or accepts VerificationConditionalFormattingRule.typed_rule metadata and does not assume W072 threshold fallback for colorScale, dataBar, iconSet, top, bottom, aboveAverage, or belowAverage metadata
obligations.promotion_consequence: OxFml formatting seam breadth remains blocked if any exercised OxCalc artifact assumes threshold fallback for those families

obligations.area: OxFml public consumer surfaces and display/publication breadth
obligations.required_evidence: current consumed OxFml public runtime/editor/replay surfaces, format_delta/display_delta distinction, callable-publication watch, provider-failure watch, and broad display/publication blockers classified
obligations.promotion_consequence: broad OxFml display/publication closure remains blocked

obligations.area: LET/LAMBDA carrier boundary and general OxFunc external owner
obligations.required_evidence: narrow LET/LAMBDA carrier rows remain in OxCalc formalization while general OxFunc semantic kernels remain external-owner exclusions
obligations.promotion_consequence: general OxFunc kernels are not promoted inside OxCalc

obligations.required_evidence: pack-grade replay governance, retained-witness/service evidence, cross-engine differential evidence, proof/model evidence, OxFml seam evidence, and no-proxy decision bound before pack-grade promotion
obligations.promotion_consequence: pack-grade replay remains blocked

obligations.required_evidence: C5 reassessment from direct pack-governance, replay, service, conformance, proof/model, diversity, and OxFml/callable evidence only
obligations.promotion_consequence: highest honest capability remains cap.C4.distill_valid unless direct W040 evidence supports a different decision

obligations.required_evidence: prompt-to-artifact checklist, pre-closure checklist, completion-claim self-audit, semantic-equivalence statement, direct-evidence coverage audit, and three-axis report
obligations.promotion_consequence: release-grade verification remains unpromoted unless every target-specific gate is directly satisfied
